name: Fried Mexican Ice Cream
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup cornflake or cookie crumbs, crushed fine
recipeInstructions:
1. Use vanilla or other flavors if you prefer.
2. Scoop out 4 or 5 balls of ice cream and return to freezer.
3. Mix cornflake crumbs, cinnamon, and sugar in a bowl.
4. Roll the frozen ice cream balls in half the crumb mixture and freeze again.
5. Beat the egg and dip the coated balls in egg, then roll them again in remaining crumbs. Freeze until ready to use.
6. For a thicker coating, repeat dipping in egg and rolling in crumbs.
7. Heat oil to 450 degrees.
8. Place a frozen ice cream ball in fryer basket or on a perforated spoon and lower into the hot oil for 1 minute.
9. Immediately remove and place in dessert compote.
10. Drizzle with honey and top with a dollop of whipped cream.
11. Continue to fry ice cream balls one at a time. The balls will be crunchy on the outside and just beginning to melt on the inside.
